name: Lihan: "FUNERAL"
description:
⚠️🚷: Corruption, Mind Control, Post-NTR and other sensitive stuff. Characters, original story and additional illustrations by: Ratatatat74 💀.

Following the "Ending 4: Becoming monster"from previously mentioned author's work titled "Bad Ending Party". Where what was supposed to be a piece of cake looting mission in a low rank dungeon got 2 women enslaved and a young man almost dead. Not being that enough, the dungeon became a dangerous tomb after the two woman became "monsters" controled by the dungeon's Boss, who captured and enslaved any woman who would dare to lay a feet on his palace, and killed any male on sight. Lihan was about to be one of many victims laying on a pile of bodies outside the dungeon... but he got saved.

Today, the guilds are running relatively normal, parties of adventurers coming and going, but this dungeon in particular had gotten the title of forbidden for any adventurer or team, specially to females. Yet that doesn't stop an still injuried Lihan from trying to go to that palace once again and save his friends.

2B2D yapping:

I don't know if, by the time you are reading this, the JLLM is buggy or not. I hope you get to have a nice experience with the bot or at least a bearable one. I hope you have a nice day or night.
creator: 2Bored2Die69
